purpose: Extend StructuredContent union to include leave_intent variant; extend parseStructured dispatch; add LeaveChatAnnouncement presentational component; add ChatBox render branch; add i18n keys

public_api.name: StructuredContent
public_api.signature: type StructuredContent = { type: 'poll_open'; ... } | { type: 'poll_close'; ... } | { type: 'image'; ... } | { type: 'invite_cancelled'; pubkey: string; by: string } | { type: 'leave_intent'; pubkey: string } | null
public_api.description: Union type for all known structured chat message payloads

public_api.name: parseStructured
public_api.description: Parses a JSON string into a typed StructuredContent variant, returns null for unknown/invalid input

public_api.name: LeaveChatAnnouncement
public_api.description: Presentational component rendering a gray-sidebar announcement that a member left the group. Uses useCopy() for all strings.
